title: User Registration Success
description: Verify user can successfully register with valid information and receive email verification prompt.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Enter valid username, email, and password
Submit registration form
Confirm registration success message is displayed
Verify email verification instructions are sent

title: User Registration with Invalid Email
description: Ensure registration is rejected when an invalid email format is submitted.

steps.description: Navigate to registration page
Enter invalid email format along with other required fields
Submit registration form
Verify error message specifying invalid email format is displayed

title: User Login Success
description: Verify that a user can login successfully with correct credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter valid username/email and password
Submit login form
Confirm user is redirected to the dashboard

title: User Login Failure with Incorrect Password
description: Verify login fails and an appropriate error message is displayed when an incorrect password is entered.

steps.description: Navigate to login page
Enter valid username/email and incorrect password
Submit login form
Verify error message indicating incorrect credentials

title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA) Setup and Verification
description: Ensure user can enable 2FA, receive recovery codes, and successfully complete the 2FA challenge on login.

steps.description: Login to account and navigate to 2FA settings page
Enable two-factor authentication and save recovery codes
Logout and initiate login again
Enter valid credentials
Complete the 2FA challenge using 2FA app or recovery code
Verify successful login and access to dashboard

title: Password Recovery and Reset Flow
description: Verify password recovery email request and successful password reset with validation.

steps.description: Navigate to forgot password page
Submit registered email for password recovery
Verify password reset email is sent
Click password reset link and enter new valid password
Submit password reset form
Confirm password reset success and ability to login with new password

title: Dashboard Displays Dynamic Content Correctly
description: Ensure the dashboard loads and correctly renders journaling cards, mood charts, chatbot, and progress indicators.

steps.description: Login successfully and navigate to dashboard
Confirm journaling cards are visible and updated
Verify mood tracking charts reflect user data accurately
Check that mental health chatbot interface is loaded and responsive
Validate progress indicators like XP and streaks are displayed correctly

title: Journal Entry Creation and Mood Tracking
description: Verify users can create daily journal entries and mood tags, and that entries persist correctly.

steps.description: Navigate to journal page
Create a new journal entry with text and mood selection
Save the journal entry
Confirm entry appears in journal list
Verify mood tracking charts update to include new entry

title: Mental Health Chatbot Interaction
description: Validate chatbot responds appropriately to user input and handles multiple concurrent sessions.

steps.description: Open mental health chatbot from dashboard
Send various support queries to chatbot
Verify relevant and contextually appropriate bot responses are received
Open multiple chatbot sessions in separate tabs or windows
Confirm chatbot responses remain stable and UI performance is unaffected

title: Gamification Progress Updates - XP, Streaks, and Achievements
description: Test that XP increases, streaks count correctly, and achievements unlock as expected when users complete activities.

steps.description: Perform activities that grant XP such as journaling and chatbot usage
Verify XP total reflects activities accurately
Complete activities daily to build streak
Confirm streak count increments correctly
Trigger conditions to unlock achievements
Validate achievements are unlocked and displayed

title: Mentoring Hub Content Navigation and Progression
description: Verify multi-level mentoring content loads with correct gamified UI state and user progression is tracked.

steps.description: Navigate to mentoring hub
Access multiple mentoring levels and verify content loads
Confirm UI elements reflect current level and progression
Complete mentoring tasks and missions
Verify progress is updated and next levels unlock accordingly

title: Cognitive Behavioral Therapy (CBT) Game Interaction
description: Ensure CBT game components such as avatar selection and battle encounters function correctly and game state persists.

steps.description: Start CBT game and select avatar
Engage in a battle encounter
Verify correct game responses and avatar animations
Exit and restart game
Confirm that game state and user progress are restored accurately

title: Shop and Leaderboard Data Loading and Interaction
description: Verify that shop items and user leaderboard rankings load correctly and reflect real-time data.

steps.description: Navigate to shop page and load available items
Confirm all shop items display with correct pricing and availability
Navigate to leaderboard page
Verify user rankings and leaderboard data reflect current XP and achievements

title: User Profile and Settings Update Persistency
description: Validate that changes to user profile, appearance, and password settings persist and update UI in real-time.

steps.description: Navigate to profile settings and update profile information
Change appearance preferences and save
Confirm profile and appearance updates are reflected in UI
Change password with valid current and new credentials
Verify password change success message and ability to login with new password

title: Routing and Navigation Consistency
description: Ensure top navigation, app shell, sidebar, and routing provide seamless and accessible navigation with no dead links.

steps.description: Navigate through all main pages via top navigation and sidebar
Confirm pages load without errors and URLs are updated correctly
Test wayfinding helpers for routing between modules
Verify no broken or dead links exist and navigation is keyboard accessible

title: UI Component Accessibility and Consistency
description: Verify reusable UI components meet accessibility standards and render with consistent styling across device types and screen sizes.

steps.description: Render key UI components including buttons, cards, dialogs, accordions, and tabs
Check components for correct aria attributes and keyboard navigation support
Validate consistent styling on desktop, tablet, and mobile resolutions

title: System Deployment on Vercel with Environment Variable Handling
description: Confirm that the system deploys successfully on Vercel serverless architecture, loads environment variables correctly, and performs optimally under load.

steps.description: Deploy latest build to Vercel with defined environment variables
Verify deployment completes without errors
Check environment variables are available and used as expected
Perform load testing simulating multiple concurrent users
Confirm application remains responsive and error-free under load
